title: MIN 688 (M) Amendment 3 code of safe working practices: 2025 edition
body: "Notice to all shipowners, ship operators, managers, masters and seafarers.  This notice replaces MIN 688 (M) Amendment 2 and expires 31st March 2026  The code of safe working practices for merchant seafarers (COSWP) 2025 Edition, is available to purchase from TSO Shop "
